designTimeMetadata.activityDescription: Triggers when an existing entity was updated
Triggers when you add a new entity

inputs.name: eventId
inputs.description: The LoanOriginationEvents record key, set when an external event triggered the invocation. Empty/null when the agent is being called from a generic re-evaluation. The agent uses this to fetch event-specific data like RunSpecificTask.

inputs.name: caseCurrentExecutionState
inputs.description: Engine snapshot. Contains: event (type + parameters), state.tasksRunning (with name + identifier), state.tasksCompleted, state.stagesEntered, state.stagesExited, state.stagesCompleted, state.vars.

inputs.name: caseInstanceId
inputs.description: The Case Management case instance ID. Passed as the caseInstanceId parameter to the API Workflow (CasePlan) tool to retrieve the case plan from PIMS.

inputs.name: folderKey
inputs.description: The Orchestrator folder key where the CasePlan API workflow is deployed. Passed directly to the API Workflow tool. This is a deployment-time constant for the solution folder.

_jsonSchema.description: All orchestration actions the agent has decided to take for this invocation.

tasksToRun.description: Tasks the agent wants to start. Each entry must use the canonical taskName from the Case Plan.

taskName.description: Canonical task name copied verbatim from the Case Plan returned by Get Case Plan, including any trailing spaces.

triggeringDecision.description: Non-empty explanation of the signal or reasoning that drove this task being started.

tasksToCancel.description: Tasks the agent wants to cancel. Each entry must use the running task identifier from the execution state, not the task name.

identifier.description: Running task identifier from currentCaseExecutionState.state.tasksRunning — not the task name.

triggeringDecision.description: Non-empty explanation of why this running task is being cancelled.

stagesToEnter.description: Stages the agent wants to enter. Each entry must use the canonical stageName from the Case Plan.

stageName.description: Canonical stage name copied verbatim from the Case Plan returned by Get Case Plan, including any trailing spaces.

triggeringDecision.description: Non-empty explanation of the signal that drove this stage transition.

traces.description: Escalation messages and reasoning traces. Populated when the agent cannot fully resolve a decision, encounters contradictory signals, or flags high-stakes routing for human review.

message.description: Escalation message or reasoning trace explaining the unresolved signal or recommendation.
